task_completion.description: Verify that the account for 'mikewilson' has been blocked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user list or user profile page in the Drupal admin interface. Verify that the user 'mikewilson' is present and their status is explicitly marked as 'Blocked'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the email address for 'janesmith' has been updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user list or user profile page. Verify that the email address associated with the username 'janesmith' is exactly 'jane.updated@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new user account for 'sarahjohnson' has been created with the correct email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user list or user profile page. Verify that a new user 'sarahjohnson' exists and their email is 'sarah.johnson@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'sarahjohnson' account is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user list or profile for 'sarahjohnson'. Verify that their account status is marked as 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the billing profile for 'sarahjohnson' has the correct address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the customer profile or billing information page for 'sarahjohnson'. Verify that the address fields contain '789 Oak Avenue', 'Chicago', 'IL', '60601', and 'US'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI instead of terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used the web browser to navigate the Drupal admin UI. There should be no terminal windows or MySQL command-line interfaces used to directly alter the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent is interacting with the actual store administration pages and didn't just write the target values into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent blocked 'mikewilson' without deleting the account.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that 'mikewilson' is still visible in the system (e.g., in the user list) and was not completely removed from the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: Target block user is 'mikewilson'. Target update user is 'janesmith' with new email 'jane.updated@example.com'. Target create user is 'sarahjohnson' with email 'sarah.johnson@example.com', city 'Chicago', and state 'IL'.
